case_title: MONICA ORTEGA VS. ANA DELIA THOME

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-24-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-06-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ORTEGA, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE. REQUEST TO RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTEGA, MONICA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-22-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTEGA, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTEGA, MONICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOME, ANA DELIA $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,585.00, THE COURT WAS UNABLE TO DETERMINE WHICH CAR PROCEEDED ON GREEN BUT DOES FIND THAT PLAINTIFF'S CAR WAS FULLY IN THE INTERSECTION , SUCH THAT DEFENDANT SHOULD HAVE SEEN PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE, AND HAD THE OPPORTUNITY TO AVOID THE COLLISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
